summary: Phase 6 implementation is complete for local validation: the frontend build passes, the compose image rebuilds successfully, the container is healthy, and both the main app and browser surfaces return the expected content.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Frontend build passes on final code
checks.actual: Frontend build succeeded and produced the final `index-DHcWTBea.js` and `index-bjpGm8Ch.css` bundles.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Docker compose rebuild succeeds on Phase 6 runtime
checks.expected: The app image rebuilds and the service restarts successfully
checks.actual: Compose rebuilt `social-listening-v3-app`, recreated the container, and started the updated runtime successfully.

checks.name: CHECK-03: Local runtime is healthy
checks.expected: Container healthy and health endpoint returns ok

checks.name: CHECK-04: Browser root serves the responsive entry page
checks.expected: Browser root serves the project-owned landing page instead of a directory listing
checks.actual: Browser root now returns `Social Listening Browser` HTML with the responsive browser entry CTA set.

checks.name: CHECK-05: mobile noVNC route is reachable
checks.expected: mobile.html is served and includes the mobile overlay assets
checks.actual: mobile.html returned the customized noVNC page with the injected mobile assets and custom title.
